tool.name: FASTA sizes
tool.command: #if str($input.ext) == 'fasta.gz' gunzip -c '$input' #else cat '$input' #end if | awk '/^>/{if(c!="")print c"\t"n; c=substr(\$1,2); n=0; next}{n+=length(\$0)}END{if(c!="")print c"\t"n}' > '$output'

param.name: input
param.label: FASTA
param.help: Map over a list collection to produce a per-strain .sizes collection.

tool.help: Emits a 2-column ``chrom<TAB>length`` table (UCSC ``.sizes``) from a FASTA — the sizes that chain/net (axtChain, chainPreNet, chainNet, netChainSubset) and multiz require. Length is computed directly (mask-invariant), no index needed. Map over a FASTA list collection to get a per-strain ``sizes`` collection.
